CREATE TABLE timestamps (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, ts TIMESTAMPTZ);
SELECT epoch_ns(ts) FROM timestamps WHERE id = 1;
SELECT epoch_ns(ts) AS nanoseconds FROM timestamps WHERE id IN (1, 2);
SELECT t1.id, epoch_ns(t2.ts) AS nanoseconds FROM timestamps t1 JOIN timestamps t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE t1.id = 4;
SELECT epoch_ns(ts) + 1000000000 AS adjusted_nanoseconds FROM timestamps WHERE ts IS NOT NULL;
SELECT IF(epoch_ns(ts) > 0, 'Positive Epoch', 'Non-Positive Epoch') AS epoch_status FROM timestamps;
WITH temp AS (SELECT epoch_ns(ts) AS ns FROM timestamps) SELECT AVG(ns) FROM temp;
CREATE TABLE other_data (data_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, ts TIMESTAMPTZ);
SELECT t.id, epoch_ns(t.ts) AS ns, o.data_id FROM timestamps t LEFT JOIN other_data o ON t.id = o.data_id WHERE epoch_ns(t.ts) > (SELECT MAX(epoch_ns(ts)) FROM other_data);
SELECT DISTINCT epoch_ns(ts) FROM timestamps HAVING COUNT(ts) > 1;
